title: Trade-log v1 — per-leg row schema
description:
The shared trade-log row schema frozen by Phase 1 item #2 (multi-leg ledger) and item #3 (per-leg cost decomposition). Every backtest in this framework — and every cross-language port (`quant-research-framework-rs`) — emits per-leg rows in this 14-column form. Downstream consumers (REPO 2 quant-mm-simulator + quant-mm-simulator-rs, the strategy-pnl-daily-rs ETL, the verification gate logs) read this contract and nothing else; new fields can be added in v2 only as additive tail columns to preserve byte-for-byte parity of legacy 7-tuple loaders.

References: backtester/ledger.py (Python source of truth) and src/lib.rs Trade struct (Rust mirror) at tag v0.7.0-pairs-carry. The kernel-emitted 9-tuple (item #2) is a strict prefix of this 14-tuple; the 5 cost-decomposition fields (item #3) trail at the end so that legacy 7-tuple and 9-tuple consumers continue to parse correctly via aggregate_legs.

entry_idx.description: Bar index (or sim-time tick) at which the leg opens. Causal: every input feature consulted at decision time has index <= entry_idx.

exit_idx.description: Bar index (or sim-time tick) at which the leg closes. Always >= entry_idx.

entry_price.description: Per-unit fill price at entry, in quote currency.

exit_price.description: Per-unit fill price at exit, in quote currency.

qty.description: Filled quantity in base asset units. Float (continuous fractional inventory; see Phase 4 item #20).

pnl.description: Realised per-leg PnL after costs. Equal to net_pnl by construction; kept under both names for backwards compatibility with legacy 7-tuple consumers.

leg_id.description: Sequence of this leg within its trade group. 0-based. Always 0 for single-leg trades (item #2 default).

trade_group_id.description: Joint-trade identifier. All legs of one logical trade share the same group_id. Single-leg single-asset runs use the kernel's row index here so each leg is its own group — preserving v0.4.0 byte-level CSV equivalence.

fee.description: Exchange fee for this leg in quote currency (always >= 0).

slippage.description: Slippage cost for this leg in quote currency (always >= 0). Computed from realized fill - mid at decision time.

funding.description: Funding cost for this leg in quote currency. Signed; positive when our position pays, negative when we receive.

gross_pnl.description: Pre-cost realised PnL: qty * side * (exit_price - entry_price).

net_pnl.description: Post-cost realised PnL. Invariant: gross_pnl - fee - slippage - funding == net_pnl, to f64 numerical noise.

$comment: Invariants enforced at runtime by tests/test_invariants.py and tests/test_invariants_property.py: (1) gross_pnl - fee - slippage - funding == net_pnl ± 1e-12 of |gross_pnl|; (2) pnl == net_pnl; (3) for any leg, every consulted bar index is <= entry_idx (the cornerstone leak invariant from item #14).
